subcodes.first_line: O beloved handmaidens of God! Sweet maidservant of God hath arrived in this pure and enchanting land with words of thanksgiving [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیزان عزیزان خدا امة الله شیرین باین زمین پاک دلنشین وارد و زبان شکرین
subcodes.subjects: @high station of the true believer, @love of God, @praise and encouragement, @present and future expansion of arts and sciences; of technology
